form.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

aiSystems.title: AI Systems Registry
aiSystems.description: Complete inventory of your artificial intelligence systems

risks.title: Risk Assessment
risks.description: Analysis and scoring of risks associated with each AI system

incidents.title: Incident Management
incidents.description: Reporting, tracking and resolution of AI incidents

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Policies, roles and AI governance committees

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Multi-framework compliance tracking (Bill 25, ISO 42001, EU AI Act)

bias.title: Bias & Fairness
bias.description: Detection and mitigation of algorithmic biases

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Tracking the lifecycle phases of each AI system

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Management and evaluation of AI solution providers

data.title: Data & PIA
data.description: Data registries and privacy impact assessments

veille.title: Regulatory Monitoring
veille.description: Automated monitoring of AI governance news by jurisdiction

bibliotheque.title: Document Library
bibliotheque.description: Central repository of ready-to-use documents, policies and procedures

modeles.title: Document Templates
modeles.description: Customizable templates for governance policies, assessments and reports

agents.title: AI Agents & Traces
agents.description: Registry of autonomous agents and log of their activities and decisions

vendorQuestionnaire.title: Automated Vendor Questionnaire
vendorQuestionnaire.description: Automatic sending of a security questionnaire to AI vendors. Collects certifications (ISO 27001, SOC 2…), data protection measures and compliance commitments, all without manual intervention.

documentDrive.title: Document Drive
documentDrive.description: A centralized storage space for all your AI governance policies, procedures and documents. Automatic versioning, complete history and role-based access control. Your organizational memory, always accessible.

legalChat.title: AI Legal Assistant (RAG Chat)
legalChat.description: A specialized chatbot using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to answer your questions based exclusively on official legal texts. Select your jurisdictions and get sourced answers with precise legal citations.
legalChat.bullet1: Search across legislative corpora (Bill 25, C-27, EU AI Act, GDPR)
legalChat.bullet2: Jurisdiction selection: Quebec, Canada, EU, France
legalChat.bullet3: Answers with precise legal article citations

mcpServer.title: MCP Server for AI Agents
mcpServer.description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server enabling autonomous AI agents to declare their algorithmic decisions and mechanism changes. Complete traceability for autonomous AI governance.
